hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold text-[#111110]
hierarchy.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-[#5C5C59]

spacing_and_layout.base_spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for standard padding. Generous whitespace to avoid clutter.
spacing_and_layout.container_borders: 1px solid border-[#E5E5E3], sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). No heavy shadows.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid pattern. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for text. Right-aligned for metrics/numbers in tables.

components.buttons: Flat background, sharp edges (rounded-sm), text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold. Primary: bg-[#001F54] text-white hover:bg-[#001F54]/90.
components.cards: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E3] rounded-sm p-6. No drop shadows unless interacting (hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200).
components.inputs: Shadcn based. border border-[#E5E5E3] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#001F54] rounded-sm. Use standard form wrappers.
components.navigation: Sidebar navigation with white background, 1px right border. Links should have subtle hover states (bg-[#F0F0EE] text-[#111110]).
components.tables: Minimalist. No vertical borders. 1px bottom border per row (`border-b border-[#E5E5E3]`). Hover effect on rows (`hover:bg-[#F9F9F8]`).
components.activity_log: Vertical timeline layout (Thread System). Left border for the thread line, dot indicators for agent nodes. Use mono font for AI raw data.
components.status_tags: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-sm border border-current font-medium.

motion.progress: Smooth width transitions for progress bars.

abstract_texture.description: Abstract white paper texture for dashboard headers or empty states.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not use light gray text on white backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.test_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='crea-pratica-button'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI entirely in Italian as per the problem statement (e.g., 'AIC – Artificial Commercialista', 'Nuova Pratica', 'Agenti AI', 'Carica Documenti').
Design for a SaaS App / Dashboard layout. Implement the 'Control Room' grid pattern (dense and functional).

The AI Activity Log is critical. Design it as a sophisticated vertical timeline or thread UI. Use `font-mono` (`IBM Plex Mono` or default monospace) for the agent outputs to give a technical, transparent feel.
Keep borders sharp (`rounded-sm` or `rounded-none`). No soft, large radii or glassmorphism.
Ensure the primary CTA ('Crea Pratica') uses the deep navy brand color (`#001F54`).
Include an 'Agenti AI' view with 4 distinct agents: Analysis, Validation, Document, Communication.
Add an upload zone for tax documents ('Carica Documenti') with a clean dashed border and neutral background.
Always apply `data-testid` attributes to critical functional elements for automated testing.
